title: Concierges
description: Assist patrons at hotel, apartment, or office building with personal services. May take messages; arrange or give advice on transportation, business services, or entertainment; or monitor guest requests for housekeeping and maintenance.

tasks.text: Provide information about local features, such as shopping, dining, nightlife, or recreational destinations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Make reservations for patrons, such as for dinner, spa treatments, or golf tee times, and obtain tickets to special events.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Make travel arrangements for sightseeing or other tours.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Pick up and deliver items or run errands for guests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan special events, parties, or meetings, which may include booking musicians or celebrities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Book airline or train tickets, reserve rental cars, or arrange shuttle service for guests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Carry out unusual requests, such as searching for hard-to-find items or arranging for exotic services, such as hot-air balloon rides.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assist guests with special needs by providing equipment such as wheelchairs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Receive, store, or deliver luggage or mail.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform office duties on a temporary basis when needed.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Arrange for the replacement of items lost by travelers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide business services for guests, such as sending or receiving faxes or shipping packages.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrange for interpreters or translators when patrons require such services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide food and beverage services to guests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
